questions.prompt: Can you tell me about your weekend trip?
questions.answer: We hiked the scenic trail that winds along the far northern ridge.

questions.prompt: Did Harold ask you for his notebook?
questions.answer: I've put it back in his locker.

questions.prompt: I'm starving after that long lecture.
questions.answer: Do you want to grab lunch first?

questions.prompt: Did Olivia tell you about the change?
questions.answer: I think she moved it to next week.

questions.prompt: Did Mariana mention the new deadline?
questions.answer: I wanted to know whether the deadline was extended.

questions.prompt: Did you register for the writing workshop?
questions.answer: I haven't signed up for the workshop yet.

questions.prompt: Did Emma tell you the gym hours?
questions.answer: I asked if the new gym opens before eight.

questions.prompt: Did Julian give you the laptop back?
questions.answer: Julian returned the laptop that he had borrowed.

questions.prompt: You should try the tutoring center sometime.
questions.answer: Where can I sign up for free tutoring?

questions.prompt: Did you see the new printer in the lab?
questions.answer: Your brand new color printer was installed by the campus support staff.

questions.prompt: Did Hector ask you about the gym?
questions.answer: Hector wondered when the newly renovated gym would open this coming fall.

questions.prompt: Did you make it to class on time?
questions.answer: I missed the early bus this morning.

questions.prompt: There's a study group forming for chemistry.
questions.answer: Where do I sign up for it?

questions.prompt: Did you ever hear back about the lab hours?
questions.answer: I wanted to know whether the lab opens early.

questions.prompt: Are you ready to hand in the assignment?
questions.answer: I haven't finished the final lab report yet.

questions.prompt: Did you ever return those library books?
questions.answer: I returned the books that I'd borrowed last week.

questions.prompt: I still need to get my ID badge.
questions.answer: You can pick up your badge at the front desk.

questions.prompt: I heard the chemistry lecture got rescheduled.
questions.answer: The lecture was moved to the bigger lecture hall.

questions.prompt: Did you check on the deadline?
questions.answer: I tried to find out when the deadline was.

questions.prompt: I wasn't sure if I could come along.
questions.answer: You're welcome to join us for the trip.

questions.prompt: Did the advisor explain your credit situation?
questions.answer: He had to figure out which of the classes I dropped still counted.

questions.prompt: Have you seen my notebook anywhere?
questions.answer: I left my notebook in the library.

questions.prompt: There's an open seat next to me.
questions.answer: Do you want to sit with us?

questions.prompt: Did you get the room change notice?
questions.answer: I needed to find out where the seminar met.

questions.prompt: Are you heading to the gym later?
questions.answer: I don't think the gym is open yet.

questions.prompt: I'm not sure who to ask about transferring.
questions.answer: You should talk to the advisor who handles transfers.

questions.prompt: I heard the library is staying open longer.
questions.answer: The library hours were extended for final exams.

questions.prompt: Are you signed up for the writing workshop?
questions.answer: I've already signed up for the writing workshop.

questions.prompt: Did you find out the gym schedule?
questions.answer: I asked whether the new gym opens before eight.

questions.prompt: I can't find the textbook on the shelves.
questions.answer: I wonder if the bookstore still has the textbook.

questions.prompt: Did you hear back about your lab results?
questions.answer: I returned the bike that my roommate had lent me last week.

questions.prompt: Are you free after lunch today?
questions.answer: I have a meeting with my advisor.

questions.prompt: Did your package ever show up?
questions.answer: I have not checked the mailroom yet.

questions.prompt: Do you know what Mariana asked you?
questions.answer: She wanted to know if the gym closed.

questions.prompt: Did you sort out your schedule problem?
questions.answer: I asked whether the late class still counts.

questions.prompt: Did you talk to anyone about the concert?
questions.answer: I wondered when the spring concert begins.

questions.prompt: There's an open spot on the trip.
questions.answer: Do you know how much it costs?

questions.prompt: I heard the chemistry section changed rooms.
questions.answer: The class was moved to the science building.

questions.prompt: Have you started your group project?
questions.answer: We have not divided the tasks yet.

questions.prompt: Did you eat anything this morning?
questions.answer: I grabbed a bagel near the dorm.

questions.prompt: Your friend dropped this off for you.
questions.answer: He returned the charger that I lent him.

questions.prompt: Are you heading out somewhere right now?
questions.answer: I am going to the campus bookstore.

questions.prompt: Is your roommate around this morning?
questions.answer: She left for the airport very early.

questions.prompt: What did the librarian tell you?
questions.answer: The journals are kept on the third floor.

questions.prompt: Your tutor said you stopped by her office.
questions.answer: I needed to find out my final grade.

questions.prompt: Did you figure out the lab hours?
questions.answer: He asked if the lab opens before nine.

questions.prompt: Have you been to the library lately?
questions.answer: I found out the library closes at midnight.

questions.prompt: I just transferred here this semester.
questions.answer: Do you know where the writing center is?

questions.prompt: Is your lab report ready to turn in?
questions.answer: I did not finish the conclusion section.

questions.prompt: Have you met the new professor yet?
questions.answer: My friend recommended the course that he teaches.

questions.prompt: I picked up the concert tickets for us.
questions.answer: The seats near the front sold out fast.
